memory.summary: The plan for the assignment analysis is getting pushed aside by a strong pull to join my cohort_3 for lunch, which aligns with my high value on relationships.

desires: Ensure the cohort_3 lunch feels genuinely connected and not just a social obligation, so I don't feel like I'm abandoning our bond for the assignment.
Maintain my reputation as reliable to the professor by finishing the analysis section before the deadline without burning out or seeming flaky.
Protect my sleep schedule from further erosion despite the stress of juggling these competing priorities tomorrow.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately to ensure the meal feels genuine and not just a social obligation, reinforcing our bond before diving into work.
goals.rationale: My value system weights relationships (0.5) heavily; skipping this would feel like abandoning my core self and risking the trust of my close friend group (closeness: 7). The plan_note conflict is already noted, so I will renegotiate the timing directly rather than letting it fester.

goals.description: Complete the assignment analysis section by Mon 18:00 using a deliberate, long-horizon planning approach to maintain reliability with prof_assignment without burning out.
goals.rationale: While maintaining my reputation as reliable is crucial (assertiveness axis), doing this right now after a planned lunch break would violate my sleep discipline (decision_tendency: 8) and likely lead to burnout. I must defer high-focus academic tasks until the relationship need is satisfied.

args.content: 저는 지금 분석 부분을 끝내고 읽기를 해야 하는데, 점심은 꼭 같이 먹자. 내일 아침에 다시 뵙거나 다른 시간으로 조정할게.

trajectory.observation: Messaged cohort_3: '저는 지금 분석 부분을 끝내고 읽기를 해야 하는데, 점심은 꼭 같이 먹자. 내일 아침에 다시 뵙거나 다른 시'.
